title: Concept Frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter in every <concepts_dir>/<id>/main.md file

id.description: Snake_case ID matching both the folder name under concepts_dir and the key in concepts.json / progress.json

name.description: Human-readable concept name matching the title in concepts.json

description.description: One-sentence plain-English summary of what this concept is

related_concepts.description: IDs from concepts.json that are closely related — prerequisites, follow-ons, or siblings
